name: KaniCasino
defaultDescription: KaniCasino is a free CS2 case simulator. Open every CS2 case, sticker capsule and souvenir package with fake coins. No real money involved.

/.title: CS2 Case Simulator | Open CS2 Cases Free | KaniCasino
/.description: Open every CS2 case, sticker capsule and souvenir package for free with fake coins. A provably fair case opening simulator with Crash, Slots and case battles.

/marketplace.title: Marketplace | KaniCasino
/marketplace.description: Buy and sell items with other players, follow the price history of every item, and place buy orders.

/crash.title: Crash | KaniCasino
/crash.description: Cash out before it burns. A live multiplayer crash game, played with fake coins.

/coinflip.title: Coin Flip | KaniCasino
/coinflip.description: Heads or tails against another player, live. No real money involved.

/upgrade.title: Upgrade | KaniCasino
/upgrade.description: Gamble your items for a shot at a better one. Provably fair, no real money involved.

/slot.title: Slots | KaniCasino
/slot.description: Spin the reels for fake coins. Provably fair, no real money involved.

/plinko.title: Plinko | KaniCasino
/plinko.description: Drop a ball down the pegs and chase the golden edge bins. Provably fair, no real money involved.

/battles.title: Case Battles | KaniCasino
/battles.description: Open cases head to head against other players. Best total value takes the pot.

/provably-fair.title: Provably Fair | KaniCasino
/provably-fair.description: Verify any roll for yourself: server seed hashes, your client seed, and the nonce behind every drop.
